overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Mediterranean architecture. The player character walks through a historic stone city, enters a building with mosaic floors, ascends stairs, and explores a rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the city and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street with stone buildings and cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path toward a grand stone mansion with tall columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white robes walking toward the camera and passing by on the left

entered.detail: large two-story stone building with red banners and tall columns
tall dark green cypress trees lining the cobblestone path
low stone retaining wall with vegetation
old wooden cart with large wheels

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with cypress trees, approaching a grand stone mansion. A pedestrian in white robes passes by as the camera moves steadily forward toward the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance stairs of stone building

events.description: begins ascending wide stone stairs toward the building entrance
enters the dark interior courtyard from bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps toward the building entrance, passing a guard at the top

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at the top of the stairs watching the approach

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the entrance
tall fluted stone columns flanking the stairs
dark interior atrium visible through the entrance doorway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone stairs toward the building entrance, passing between tall columns. A guard stands watch at the top as the character enters the dark interior courtyard, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior atrium with mosaic flooring and large pottery

events.description: enters the interior courtyard with geometric mosaic tile flooring
begins ascending interior staircase toward the rooftop exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior courtyard and ascending a staircase toward a bright rooftop exit

entered.detail: intricate geometric mosaic tile pattern in black and white
large decorative pottery urns with red and yellow banded patterns
stone staircase leading upward toward a bright doorway
carved wooden partition with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit atrium, the character walks across an intricate mosaic floor past large decorative urns. The character then ascends an interior staircase, moving from the shadowy courtyard toward a bright doorway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with stone balustrades overlooking the ancient city

events.description: exits the dark interior onto the bright rooftop terrace
emerges into bright sunlight on the rooftop with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop terrace, observing the panoramic views of the ancient city, terracotta roofs, and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at the far end of the terrace overlooking the city

entered.detail: decorative carved stone railing along the terrace edge
red tiled rooftops of neighboring ancient buildings
distant mountains visible beyond the city walls
wooden lattice pergola providing partial shade over the walkway
large wooden planters with purple flowering plants

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the sunlit rooftop terrace, the character walks along stone balustrades with panoramic views of the ancient city, terracotta roofs, and distant mountains. The character passes under a wooden pergola and approaches a guard standing at the far end of the terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, bustling city street into the depths of a grand mansion before emerging onto a panoramic rooftop. It begins by gliding along a sunlit cobblestone path lined with cypress trees, moving steadily past a robed pedestrian toward the entrance of a stone estate. As the camera ascends the grand stairs between towering columns, the scene shifts abruptly from the brilliant outdoor light into the cool shadows of a dark interior courtyard. The movement continues across an intricate mosaic floor and up an interior staircase, transitioning from the dim atrium back toward a burst of light at a distant doorway. Finally, the camera emerges onto a sunlit rooftop terrace, sweeping past stone balustrades and a wooden pergola to reveal a wide vista of terracotta roofs and distant mountains.
